commit.message:
refactor: split checklists god store into focused modules (#19)

* refactor: split checklists god store into focused modules

Extract the 923-line checklists.ts into separate concerns:
- src/config/constants.ts: centralise all magic numbers
- composables/useTreeHelpers.ts: pure tree traversal utilities
- composables/useSnoozeOptions.ts: snooze date calculation
- composables/useSyncManager.ts: PouchDB sync + exponential backoff
- composables/useDayPlanning.ts: day planning, task status, withItem() helper
- stores/planMeta.ts: PlanMeta localStorage persistence

checklists.ts now contains only core CRUD; public store API is unchanged.
SnoozeMenu and ChecklistCard updated to import from new source locations.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gq6Bn6mgF3B1aijG7JV3w2

* docs: check off refactoring 1 (god store split) in refactoring-plan.md

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Gq6Bn6mgF3B1aijG7JV3w2

commit.message:
Overhaul block library with 9 curated blocks + Block Library placeholder

Removed: Checkerboard, Check, Stripe, Log Cabin
Added / replaced:
- 4-Patch (A=FREE, B=NEUTRAL) — the essential two-tone building block
- 9-Patch X (A=FREE corners+center, B=NEUTRAL) — diagonal X reads across block
- 9-Patch O (A=NEUTRAL, B=FREE edges) — ring of color reads as O
- 9-Patch + (A=NEUTRAL corners, B=FREE cross) — strong + grid across quilt
- 16-Patch (A=FREE, B=SHADE_LIGHT, 4×4) — tone-on-tone two-value check
- 25-Patch (A=FREE, B=SHADE_LIGHT, 5×5) — fine-grained tonal alternating grid
- Granny Square rebuilt as 5×5 (A=FREE, B=SHADE_LIGHT, C=SHADE_DARK, D=NEUTRAL)
  — four concentric rings radiating from center
- Gingham Classic / Gingham Rich: updated descriptions (no color language)
- Block Library placeholder button (dashed, disabled, future expansion)

commit.message:
feat(data): expand to 111 instance types across 30 AWS regions

Dataset (2,570 rows):
- Added 6 missing regions: ca-west-1, eu-central-2, eu-south-2,
  ap-southeast-3, ap-southeast-4, mx-central-1 (now all 30 GA regions)
- Added missing instance families: t3a, t4g, m6a/m6g/m7i/m7a/m8g,
  c6a/c6g/c7i/c7a, r6a/r6g/r7i/r7a, z1d, x2idn, im4gn,
  g6, p4d, trn1, inf2, hpc7g (111 types across 5 categories)

App (docs/index.html):
- Hero stats now show unique instance type count (111) with correct
  labels: Instance Types / Sub-families / AWS Regions
- Updated FAMILY_INFO descriptions and examples to cover all new families
  (c6a/c6g/c7i/c7a/hpc7g for CPU; g5/g6/trn1/inf2 for GPU;
   r6a/r6g/r7i/r7a/r7g/z1d/x2idn for Memory; t3a/t4g/m-family for General)
- Added docs/.nojekyll to skip Jekyll processing on GitHub Pages

scripts/fetch_aws_prices_once.py:
- Updated TARGET_REGIONS to all 30 GA regions
- Updated TARGET_TYPES to all 111 instance types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch SRAM from 23LC1024 (128KB) to 23LC256 (32KB), fix 74HC595 QA pin docs

- Replace 23LC1024 with 23LC256: same DIP-8 pinout, 16-bit addressing
- SRAM driver: 24-bit → 16-bit address (drop one spi_transfer call)
- SimAVR harness: update SRAM emulation to 2-byte addressing and 32KB
- Fix piirikaavio.md: QA was incorrectly marked as unused (is /SIDE1)
- Fix shiftreg.h bit mapping comment to match actual hardware wiring
- Update all docs, schematics, PCB files, tools for both 2-layer and 4-layer

Actual SRAM usage is ~22KB, so 32KB is sufficient with margin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve glossary standardization: aggressive merging + fuzzy pre-hints

- Rewrote _STANDARDIZE_SYSTEM prompt to err on the side of merging:
  explicitly lists what ALWAYS gets merged (variations, abbreviations,
  plural/singular, restatements) vs what to keep separate (genuinely
  distinct concepts)
- Added fuzzy pre-grouping: before calling LLM, compute word-overlap
  between all term pairs (Jaccard >= 0.5) and pass the likely-duplicate
  pairs as hints in the prompt so the LLM doesn't miss obvious clusters
  like "Agentic Coding" / "Agentic AI Coding" / "Agentic Engineering"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

include/sta/, src/vm/, src/actor/, src/gc/, src/scheduler/,
src/io/, src/bootstrap/, tests/, examples/embed_basic/,
docs/decisions/ — all per setup-checklist.md Section 2 / ADR 003.

feat: add user-controlled consent layer for memory sharing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(security): centralize HTML rendering via SafeHtml component (#614)

* fix(security): centralize HTML rendering via SafeHtml component

Replace all direct dangerouslySetInnerHTML usage with a centralized
<SafeHtml> wrapper that sanitizes content through sanitize-html allowlist.
This eliminates Semgrep dangerouslySetInnerHTML findings codebase-wide
(29 files) and establishes a single trusted rendering path.

- Create SafeHtml component in components/ui/safe-html.tsx
- Refactor all storefront/blog HTML content rendering to use SafeHtml
- Remove pre-sanitization in server components (SafeHtml handles it)
- Update .semgrepignore to reflect new architecture
- Add colocated tests for all modified components (8 new test files)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove unused ts-expect-error in BlogContentRenderer test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review findings on SafeHtml PR

Security fixes:
- Remove safe-html.tsx from .semgrepignore — security-critical component
  should be scanned, biome-ignore inline comment is sufficient
- Add falsy html guard to SafeHtml to avoid unnecessary sanitization
- Add javascript: protocol URL test to safe-html.test.tsx

Test quality improvements:
- Remove unused _bubble variable in chat-message test
- Fix misleading mock placement comment in about-page-client test
- Use RTL screen.getByTitle for iframe queries instead of querySelector
- Use de-DE locale for differentiated formatting test assertion
- Remove unnecessary type assertion in product-details-tabs test
- Add combined marks (bold+italic) test for BlogContentRenderer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(security): move auth before body parsing in record-payment route

Restructure the record-payment API route so authentication runs before
any request body processing. This resolves CodeQL alert #1314
(js/user-controlled-bypass) and follows the project's standard API
pattern of auth-first.

Previous order: CSRF → parse body → validate → auth → process
New order:      CSRF → auth → parse body → validate → process

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(test): make javascript: protocol assertion unconditional

Replace conditional `if (link)` pattern with definitive assertions that
verify sanitize-html strips the href (removing link role) while keeping text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review findings (round 2)

- Replace JSON.stringify with safeJsonLdStringify in landing page (3 spots)
- Replace select('*') with explicit columns in blog post query
- Validate video iframe URLs with host whitelist (YouTube, Vimeo only)
- Remove dangerouslySetInnerHTML from SafeHtml test mock
- Use semantic role queries instead of data-testid in test mocks
- Remove hardcoded text-gray-600 from custom content SafeHtml (theming)
- Use prose-headings:text-inherit for theme-aware product descriptions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: extract video embed utility and fix double view count

- Extract inline IIFE video URL validation into `getVideoEmbedUrl()` utility
  with tests (14 cases), adds Vimeo share URL normalization
- Move `increment_blog_post_views` RPC from `getBlogPost()` to page component
  so `generateMetadata()` no longer triggers a duplicate view increment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: bypass Vercel image proxy for external CDN images

Cloudflare WAF blocks Vercel's server-side image fetches, causing
OPTIMIZED_EXTERNAL_IMAGE_REQUEST_UNAUTHORIZED (502) for all CDN-hosted
product images. Add custom image loader that serves external URLs
directly from their CDN while preserving Next.js optimization for
local/relative paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review findings (round 4)

- Include video_url in hasStructuredContent check so merchants with only
  a video configured still see the video section
- Restrict video embed URLs to HTTPS only (reject http:)
- Add www.vimeo.com to allowed video hosts
- Remove unnecessary Promise.resolve wrapper around supabase.rpc
- Add sizes prop to blog featured Image for responsive optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: exclude test fixture URLs from link checker

Video embed test uses dummy video IDs (abc123, xyz, 123456789) that
return 404 when the link checker tries to visit them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: sanitize JSONB image URLs with Zod to handle quote corruption

Add Zod schemas to strip literal embedded quotes and whitespace from
image URLs in color_images and images JSONB fields. Includes
deduplication and proper null/empty fallbacks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: fix link-checker test exclusion and harden video host check

- Fix lychee workflow glob prefix mismatch (./ vs no prefix) so
  exclude_path in lychee.toml properly excludes test files
- Add evil.com to lychee exclude patterns (test fixture domain)
- Replace hostname.includes('youtube.com') with exact match to prevent
  subdomain spoofing (e.g. fakeyoutube.com)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address CodeRabbit review findings on image loading PR

- Add clarifying comment that remotePatterns are unused with custom loader
- Add edge-case tests for empty src and protocol-relative URLs
- Validate YouTube video IDs against 11-char pattern to prevent injection
- Add subdomain spoofing rejection test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address review findings in PR #614

- BlogContentRenderer: replace SafeHtml inside <pre> with <code> element

Add Variance Engine product spec

Spec for xG-based variance detection system: multi-source xG
venue splits (Understat, FBref, Fotmob), attack/defense variance
decomposition, regression confidence scoring, injury-aware line
assessment, CLV-calibrated bet filter with 25-35% selectivity.
Adds variance as 4th signal in composite model.

commit.message:
fix: safe JSON payload delivery for rich text content

Agents constructing curl -d with inline markdown (backticks, quotes,
brackets) caused shell parsing failures. Adds @file pattern guardrails
to getContentManagementContext(), CLAUDE.md, and API docs so agents
write JSON to temp files before posting. Includes stdlib-only Python
utility (safe-post.py) as an alternative execution path.

docs: update development.md to reflect current project state

Update project structure, types, build targets, and testing sections

commit.message:
fix(BUG-033): Fix second N+1 query in /admin/matching-diagnostics

Previously UserMatches.get_user_matches() was called for each user in the
diagnostics loop, causing 97+ individual database calls and 90s+ timeouts.

Changes:
- Added get_all_user_matches() bulk method to SupabaseUserMatches adapter
- Pre-fetch all user match caches before the loop in matching_diagnostics()
- Use pre-fetched data in loop instead of individual DB calls

This complements the earlier fix for UserProfile N+1 (user_profiles table).
Now both user_profiles and user_match_cache are bulk-fetched upfront.

commit.message:
Bolt: Replace select('*') with explicit columns in Santa actions (#619)

* perf(santa): Replace select('*') with explicit column definitions in Santa action handlers

Identified two instances where `select('*')` was unnecessarily used to fetch data for the santa chat interactions. Explicitly selecting the columns `total_chats, unique_sessions, wishes_granted, wishes_denied, total_revenue, avg_discount` and `id, created_at, interaction_type, user_message, santa_response, product_name, approved_price, discount_percentage, session_id` reduces the memory load and transmission payload of these queries.

Co-authored-by: ogabasseyy <196925138+ogabasseyy@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(santa): Correct type mismatch by adding missing column to explicit select

Added `merchant_id` to the select statement to satisfy the TypeScript compiler check which was failing because the explicit select generated a smaller Partial interface from the generated Supabase type, causing a regression in `pnpm turbo typecheck`.

Co-authored-by: ogabasseyy <196925138+ogabasseyy@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(deploy): Clean up unused deployment artifacts

Removed generated `.orig` and `.rej` merge conflict markers in `.github/workflows` to ensure clean PRs.

Co-authored-by: ogabasseyy <196925138+ogabasseyy@users.noreply.github.com>

* ci: Add --yes flag to vercel cli commands to prevent interactive prompts

Added the `--yes` flag to `vercel build` and `vercel deploy` commands in the deployment github action workflow. This prevents the CLI from occasionally hanging or aborting uploads by expecting interactive confirmation prompts on CI.

Co-authored-by: ogabasseyy <196925138+ogabasseyy@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: remove unnecessary merchant_id from select columns in Santa actions

The merchant_id column was selected but never used in the return types
(SantaStats, SantaInteraction). It's only needed for the .eq() filter,
not in the result set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Fix stanza 3 line 1: literal translation (song 1)

"Зачем мне дольше медлить" → "Зачем должен я дольше оставаться"

- "weilen" → "оставаться" (stay, not hesitate)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add match expression codegen with compare-and-branch cascade

Match expressions now compile to PPC compare-and-branch chains:
- Integer pattern arms: cmpwi + bne to skip non-matching arms
- Wildcard _ arm: fallthrough (no comparison)
- let x = match val { N => expr, _ => expr } stores result
- Statement-level match val { N => { block }, _ => { block } }
  compiles block arms via recursive compile_function_body()
- Comment/attribute skipping inside match arms

Example: match x { 0 => 100, 1 => 200, _ => 999 } generates:
  cmpwi r14, 0 / bne skip / li r15, 100 / b end
  cmpwi r14, 1 / bne skip / li r15, 200 / b end
  li r15, 999 / b end

Tested: 300 random vendored .rs files, zero timeouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
